case.title: COMMISSIONER OF INTERNAL REVENUE v. SHAW-WALKER CO.

opinion.h: COMMISSIONER OF INTERNAL REVENUE v. SHAW-WALKER CO., 393 U.S. 478 (1969)
COMMISSIONER OF INTERNAL REVENUE v. SHAW-WALKER CO. ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF CERTIORARI TO THE UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE SIXTH CIRCUIT. No. 95. Decided January 27, 1969.
opinion.p: Certiorari granted; 390 F.2d 205, vacated and remanded.
Richard E. Nolan and John P. Carroll, Jr., for respondent.

The petition for a writ of certiorari is granted and the judgment is vacated. The case is remanded to the Court of Appeals for further consideration in light of United States v. Donruss Co., ante, p. 297.
